summary.goal: Load images and resources asynchronously without blocking the text rendering pipeline, with proper placeholders, caching, and memory management
summary.description:
Markdown files can reference images and other resources. Loading these must not block the text rendering pipeline.

## Image Types to Handle

### Local Images (Relative Paths)
- Resolve relative to the markdown file location
- Load asynchronously, display placeholder until ready
- Downscale to display resolution (no point holding 4000x3000 source in memory)
- Cache decoded image for scroll performance

### Remote Images (HTTP/HTTPS URLs)
- Async download with URLSession
- Show subtle loading placeholder (skeleton or dim rect)
- Cache to disk (NSURLCache) for re-opens
- Timeout: 10s, then show broken-image placeholder
- Respect user network preferences (no loading on metered connections?)

### Base64 Embedded Images
- Decode on background thread
- These can be large — decode lazily when scrolled into view

## Performance Guardrails
- **Per-image memory cap**: Downscale any image > 2048px in either dimension
- **Total image memory budget**: ~200MB across all images in a window
- **Lazy loading**: Only decode/download images within viewport + 1 screenful buffer
- **Recycle**: Release decoded image data for images far from viewport

## Layout Considerations
- Reserve space for images before they load (use width/height if specified in markdown)
- If no dimensions specified, use intrinsic size once loaded, then relayout
- Avoid layout thrashing: batch relayouts when multiple images load simultaneously

## Error Handling
- Broken image link: show subtle placeholder with file path
- Network failure: show cached version if available, otherwise placeholder
- Unsupported format: log warning, show placeholder
- Never crash or hang due to image loading failures

## Image UX States (improvement)
- Loading: skeleton rectangle with subtle shimmer animation (respects Reduce Motion)
- Loaded: smooth fade-in (200ms, or instant with Reduce Motion)
- Error: subtle placeholder icon with filename/alt text below, muted colors
- Oversized: images scaled to fit content width, click to view full-size in Preview.app

acceptance_criteria.description: Image loading never blocks text rendering pipeline
Relative paths resolve correctly to markdown file location
HTTP/HTTPS images download with URLSession and show placeholders
Images respect 200MB total memory budget and lazy loading
Broken images show placeholders, never crash the app
Uses NSTextAttachment with custom providers for async image display in TextKit 2

observations: Three image types: local (relative), remote (HTTP/S), base64 embedded
NSTextAttachment with custom providers for TextKit 2 integration
URLSession for async downloads, NSURLCache for disk caching
200MB total image memory budget per window
SVG via NSImage native rendering — static content only
concerns: Layout thrashing when multiple images load simultaneously
Base64 images can be very large — need lazy decoding

observations: Loading: skeleton rectangle with shimmer (respects Reduce Motion)
Error: subtle placeholder with filename/alt text, muted colors
Oversized: scale to fit, click for full-size in Preview.app

architect.caching: Disk cache via NSURLCache with max-size cap and TTL
architect.memory_cap: 200MB total across all images per window
architect.svg_strategy: NSImage native SVG rendering, static content only
architect.gif_strategy: Lazy load, play only when in viewport, pause when scrolled away

steps.title: Create ImageAttachmentProvider for TextKit 2 async image display
steps.description: Implement a custom NSTextAttachmentViewProvider subclass (or NSTextAttachment with custom cell) that integrates with TextKit 2 for async image display. When the pipeline encounters an image node in the AST, it creates an NSTextAttachment with a custom provider. The provider initially shows a placeholder, then replaces it with the loaded image. The attachment must report correct bounds for layout — either from markdown-specified dimensions or estimated/placeholder dimensions until the image loads.

acceptance_criteria.description: Custom NSTextAttachmentViewProvider integrates with TextKit 2 layout
Placeholder displayed immediately while image loads
Attachment bounds set from markdown dimensions if specified
Image replaces placeholder when loaded without breaking layout

architecture.bounds: Explicit from markdown or placeholder size until loaded
architecture.layout_update: Invalidate layout for attachment range when image loads

steps.title: Implement local image loading with path resolution
steps.description: Implement loading for local images referenced by relative paths in markdown. Resolve paths relative to the markdown file's directory (file URL). Load images asynchronously on a background queue. Use NSImage(contentsOf:) for standard formats (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, TIFF). For SVG, use NSImage which supports SVG natively on macOS. Downscale images exceeding 2048px in either dimension to save memory. Cache the decoded NSImage for reuse during scrolling.

acceptance_criteria.description: Relative paths resolve against markdown file directory
PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, TIFF, SVG formats load correctly
Images > 2048px downscaled to fit memory budget
Loading occurs on background queue, never blocks main thread
Decoded images cached in memory for scroll performance

architecture.downscale: CGImage resize for images > 2048px in either dimension
architecture.cache: NSCache<URL, NSImage> with 200MB total cost limit

steps.title: Implement remote image downloading with disk cache
steps.description: Implement async downloading of remote images (HTTP/HTTPS URLs) using URLSession. Configure URLCache for disk caching so re-opening a file does not re-download images. Set a 10-second timeout for downloads. On success, decode and display. On failure (timeout, network error, 404), show error placeholder. Respect cache headers from server. Add network entitlement to the app's entitlements file (com.apple.security.network.client).

acceptance_criteria.description: Remote images download asynchronously via URLSession
Disk cache prevents re-downloading on re-open (URLCache)
10-second timeout with error placeholder on failure
Network entitlement added to app configuration
Cache respects HTTP cache headers

steps.title: Implement base64 embedded image decoding
steps.description: Handle data URI images embedded in markdown (data:image/png;base64,...). Decode the base64 data on a background thread. These can be very large so decode lazily — only when the image is near the viewport. Parse the MIME type from the data URI to determine format. Apply the same downscaling rules (> 2048px). Cache decoded result to avoid re-decoding on scroll.

acceptance_criteria.description: Base64 data URI images decoded and displayed correctly
Decoding happens on background thread
MIME type parsed from data URI (image/png, image/jpeg, etc.)
Large base64 images downscaled per memory rules

architecture.parsing: Regex to extract MIME type and base64 data from data: URI
architecture.lazy: Only decode when image attachment is within viewport buffer

steps.title: Implement image memory management and viewport-based loading
steps.description: Implement the memory management layer for images. Track total image memory usage per window. Only load/decode images within the viewport plus 1 screenful buffer above and below. Release decoded image data for images far from the viewport (keep the placeholder). Use NSCache with a 200MB total cost limit. Monitor scroll position to trigger load/unload cycles. When total memory exceeds budget, evict furthest-from-viewport images first.

acceptance_criteria.description: Total image memory stays under 200MB per window
Only images near viewport are decoded in memory
Far-from-viewport images release decoded data
Scroll position changes trigger load/unload of images
Eviction prioritizes images furthest from viewport

architecture.tracking: NSCache with totalCostLimit = 200MB, image cost = decoded byte size
architecture.viewport_buffer: 1 screenful above and below visible area
architecture.scroll_observer: NSScrollView bounds change notification for viewport tracking
architecture.eviction: LRU by distance from viewport center

steps.title: Implement image placeholder and error states with animations
steps.description: Create the visual placeholder and error states for images. Loading state: gray rectangle matching expected image dimensions with a subtle shimmer animation (respects Reduce Motion — no animation if enabled). Loaded state: smooth 200ms fade-in transition from placeholder to image (instant if Reduce Motion). Error state: muted icon (broken image symbol) with filename or alt text below in muted theme color. Oversized images: scale to fit content width preserving aspect ratio.

acceptance_criteria.description: Loading placeholder shows gray rectangle with shimmer animation
Shimmer disabled when Reduce Motion is enabled
Loaded images fade in over 200ms (instant with Reduce Motion)
Error state shows broken-image icon with filename/alt text
Images wider than content area scale to fit, preserving aspect ratio

design.error_icon: SF Symbols photo.fill or similar, muted color
design.scaling: Aspect-fit to content width, never wider than content area

architecture.animation: CAAnimation on the attachment view layer
